title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1527 - Violation of sections 375.1500 to 375.1527, penalties
text:
375.1527.  Violation of sections 375.1500 to 375.1527, penalties. — In addition to any other penalties provided by the laws of this state, an insurer or producer that violates a requirement of sections 375.1500 to 375.1527 shall be guilty of an unfair trade practice pursuant to sections 375.930 to 375.948.
(L. 1998 S.B. 722 § 15)
